result.stdout:
Description:
  Dependency updater tool that processes dependency updates based on configuration files.

Usage:
  Aviationexam.DependencyUpdater [command] [options]

Options:
  --directory <directory> (REQUIRED)        The path to the local Git repository where dependencies will be updated. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-aviationexam.dependencyupdater-0.7.2-7c79bc29524242cca7f5c0342941fa84]
  --git-username <git-username>             The username used for authenticating with the remote Git repository.
  --git-password <git-password> (REQUIRED)  The password or personal access token used for authenticating with the remote Git repository.
  --reset-cache                             Clears the internal dependency cache before processing updates.
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
  --version                                 Show version information

Commands:
  AzureDevOps  Updates dependencies in Azure DevOps repositories.
  GitHub       Updates dependencies in GitHub repositories.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Dependency updater tool that processes dependency updates based on configuration files.

Usage:
  Aviationexam.DependencyUpdater [command] [options]

Options:
  --directory <directory> (REQUIRED)        The path to the local Git repository where dependencies will be updated. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-aviationexam.dependencyupdater-0.7.2-7c79bc29524242cca7f5c0342941fa84]
  --git-username <git-username>             The username used for authenticating with the remote Git repository.
  --git-password <git-password> (REQUIRED)  The password or personal access token used for authenticating with the remote Git repository.
  --reset-cache                             Clears the internal dependency cache before processing updates.
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
  --version                                 Show version information

Commands:
  AzureDevOps  Updates dependencies in Azure DevOps repositories.
  GitHub       Updates dependencies in GitHub repositories.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Updates dependencies in Azure DevOps repositories.

Usage:
  Aviationexam.DependencyUpdater AzureDevOps [options]

Options:
  --organization <organization> (REQUIRED)                          The name of the Azure DevOps organization (e.g., 'contoso').
  --project <project> (REQUIRED)                                    The Azure DevOps project that contains the target repository.
  --repository <repository> (REQUIRED)                              The name of the Azure DevOps Git repository to operate on.
  --pat <pat> (REQUIRED)                                            The Azure DevOps personal access token used for authentication.
  --account-id <account-id> (REQUIRED)                              The Azure DevOps user or service account ID used for API access.
  --nuget-project <nuget-project> (REQUIRED)                        The Azure DevOps project that contains the NuGet artifacts feed.
  --nuget-feed-id <nuget-feed-id> (REQUIRED)                        The ID of the Azure Artifacts NuGet feed used for dependency resolution.
  --nuget-service-host <nuget-service-host> (REQUIRED)              The internal Azure DevOps service host identifier used when accessing upstream package data.
  --access-token-resource-id <access-token-resource-id> (REQUIRED)  The Azure Active Directory resource ID used to acquire access tokens for upstream ingestion.
  --az-side-car-address <az-side-car-address>                       The URL address for AZ sidecar service, used to fetch Azure DevOps access-token.
  --az-side-car-token <az-side-car-token>                           The token for AZ sidecar service, used to fetch Azure DevOps access-token.
  -?, -h, --help                                                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Updates dependencies in Azure DevOps repositories.

Usage:
  Aviationexam.DependencyUpdater AzureDevOps [options]

Options:
  --organization <organization> (REQUIRED)                          The name of the Azure DevOps organization (e.g., 'contoso').
  --project <project> (REQUIRED)                                    The Azure DevOps project that contains the target repository.
  --repository <repository> (REQUIRED)                              The name of the Azure DevOps Git repository to operate on.
  --pat <pat> (REQUIRED)                                            The Azure DevOps personal access token used for authentication.
  --account-id <account-id> (REQUIRED)                              The Azure DevOps user or service account ID used for API access.
  --nuget-project <nuget-project> (REQUIRED)                        The Azure DevOps project that contains the NuGet artifacts feed.
  --nuget-feed-id <nuget-feed-id> (REQUIRED)                        The ID of the Azure Artifacts NuGet feed used for dependency resolution.
  --nuget-service-host <nuget-service-host> (REQUIRED)              The internal Azure DevOps service host identifier used when accessing upstream package data.
  --access-token-resource-id <access-token-resource-id> (REQUIRED)  The Azure Active Directory resource ID used to acquire access tokens for upstream ingestion.
  --az-side-car-address <az-side-car-address>                       The URL address for AZ sidecar service, used to fetch Azure DevOps access-token.
  --az-side-car-token <az-side-car-token>                           The token for AZ sidecar service, used to fetch Azure DevOps access-token.
  -?, -h, --help                                                    Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Updates dependencies in GitHub repositories.

Usage:
  Aviationexam.DependencyUpdater GitHub [options]

Options:
  --owner <owner> (REQUIRED)                                     The GitHub repository owner (organization or user account name).
  --repository <repository> (REQUIRED)                           The name of the GitHub repository to operate on.
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                                     The GitHub personal access token (PAT) used for authentication.
  --authentication-proxy-address <authentication-proxy-address>  Optional HTTP(S) proxy address for GitHub API authentication. When set, PR creation requests are routed through this proxy to overcome GitHub limitations.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Updates dependencies in GitHub repositories.

Usage:
  Aviationexam.DependencyUpdater GitHub [options]

Options:
  --owner <owner> (REQUIRED)                                     The GitHub repository owner (organization or user account name).
  --repository <repository> (REQUIRED)                           The name of the GitHub repository to operate on.
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                                     The GitHub personal access token (PAT) used for authentication.
  --authentication-proxy-address <authentication-proxy-address>  Optional HTTP(S) proxy address for GitHub API authentication. When set, PR creation requests are routed through this proxy to overcome GitHub limitations.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information
